key_points: The story is set in a futuristic space station where construction workers assemble structures in zero gravity
Sven Olsen secretly introduces a canary named Claribel to study how animals adapt to space conditions
Claribel quickly adjusts to the weightless environment and becomes the crew’s shared pet
A malfunction in the station’s air purifier creates a dangerous drop in oxygen levels
Claribel’s collapse becomes the only warning signal because the alarm system had not yet been connected
examples: The narrator initially thought Claribel’s whistle came from the station intercom
Claribel’s ability to float and perform loops showed her quick adaptation to zero gravity
When Claribel collapsed, the crew realized something unusual was happening in the station
The narrator connected the incident to the historical practice of using canaries in coal mines
The failure of the alarm circuit proved that technology alone cannot guarantee safety
formulas_or_processes: Exploration → Construction and life in a space station
Curiosity → Sven brings Claribel as an experiment
Crisis → Air purifier malfunction reduces oxygen levels
Signal → Claribel collapses due to sensitivity to air quality
Resolution → Crew discovers and fixes the technical problem
exam_tips: Explain how the author connects real scientific practices with a science fiction setting
Understand the symbolic role of Claribel as a natural warning system
Focus on the relationship between technology, nature, and human observation
Remember the central message: even advanced technology requires human awareness and backup safety measures
